summary: Full backend + mobile UI regression for iteration 2 (Profile module + vibrant AI screen). 15/15 backend pytest cases pass. Full frontend flow (login -> dashboard -> all 6 tabs -> profile save -> dashboard refresh) works end-to-end. All new testIDs (avatars x12, profile inputs, save/logout, profile-button, insight badge) are present and functional.

issues: Expo version-mismatch warnings on startup: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage 3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), expo-linear-gradient 55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8), react-native-svg 15.15.4 (expected 15.12.1). No functional impact observed on web preview but should be aligned for native Expo Go.
React Native Web deprecation warnings in console: props.pointerEvents, TouchableMixin, transform-origin. Cosmetic — coming from 3rd-party libs.

action_items: Optional: align expo-linear-gradient / async-storage / react-native-svg versions with Expo SDK expected versions to silence startup warnings and ensure native builds work.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 800+ lines — consider splitting auth / dashboard / inventory / expenses / ai into separate routers for maintainability.

PATCH /api/profile treats empty-string fields as valid updates (name.trim() can be empty -> filtered by `is not None` so empty string passes through). Not blocking, but consider rejecting blank strings for name/business_name/gst_number.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates a fresh TEST_profile_<uuid>@restaurant.com user via /api/auth/demo-login, seeding 3 branches + 90 days of sales/menu/inventory/expenses. UI flow created ui_<uuid>@r.com user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_restaurant_api.py is the canonical regression. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is read from env. Demo-login is the shortcut for auth — never need Google OAuth in tests. AI insights call Claude Sonnet 4.5 and can take 8-12s; test sets timeout=60s. Profile fields (avatar_id, business_name, gst_number, logo_url) are persisted on users collection and appear in /auth/me.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs. Two initial pytest failures on unauth tests were test-script artefacts (shared requests.Session retained session_token cookie from demo-login fixture); fixed by using a bare requests.get/patch (no session) for unauth assertions.
